summary: Completed testing of P0 bug fix for 100% discount free order flow. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend OrderSuccess page displays download links properly.
critical_code_review_comments: Download links are only created for products with matching entries in PRODUCT_FILES mapping. Products from Quick Order page use different IDs (e.g., 'holiday-nibble-covenant-adult-interactive') that don't have PDF mappings, so no download tokens are generated for those. This is expected behavior but worth noting.
The coupon 'BETA100' mentioned in the test request doesn't exist - valid 100% coupons are: BETATEST, Beta1!2!3!, Beta123abc, Beta123abcd, test12345, test1234, test123
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test free orders during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified working. Free order flow with 100% discount coupon now: 1) Creates download links for products with PDF mappings, 2) Returns download_links array in API response, 3) OrderSuccess page displays downloads correctly. Use valid coupons like BETATEST (not BETA100). Products from Quick Order page use different IDs than PRODUCT_FILES mapping.

backend_api_tests: Free order with single digital product creates download links
Free order with multiple products creates download links
Non-100% discount rejected by free-order endpoint
Download link info endpoint returns correct config
frontend_ui_tests: Free order checkout redirects to order-success page
Download PDF buttons are clickable and work
